description: Evidence-backed web research for AI agents with citations and confidence scores.
name: io.github.BrowseAI-HQ/browseai-dev

environmentVariables.description: BrowseAI Dev API key (get one at https://browseai.dev/dashboard). Recommended — enables premium verification pipeline.
environmentVariables.name: BROWSE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Tavily API key for web search (get one at https://tavily.com). Required in BYOK mode if BROWSE_API_KEY is not set.
environmentVariables.name: SERP_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: OpenRouter API key for LLM extraction (get one at https://openrouter.ai). Required in BYOK mode if BROWSE_API_KEY is not set.
environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY

title: BrowseAI Dev
